Bash(cd /Users/keka/Desktop/Capalyse/backend && python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from agentos.db.models import Base
import agentos.db.capalyse_models
tables = Base.metadata.tables
print\(f'Total tables: {len\(tables\)}'\)
for name in sorted\(tables.keys\(\)\):
    print\(f'  - {name}'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m "baseline: agentos core + capalyse domain models" 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(rm -f agentos.db && python3 -m alembic upgrade head 2>&1)
